dc:title: Bicycle view along a street beside historic stone walls and a church dome
dc:description: Color street scene photographed from behind bicycle handlebars in the foreground, with the saddle, brake cable, and a blurred handlebar-mounted device visible at the bottom edge. A paved roadway curves through an urban area beside a long historic stone fortification or retaining wall on the left, topped with crenellations in places. Behind the wall rises a church or civic building with a prominent domed roof and small lantern. Several cars and a van travel along the road, while a pedestrian walks on the sidewalk near the wall. On the right side are a leafy tree, streetlights, bollards, and low commercial or residential buildings with outdoor seating. The image has warm late-afternoon sunlight, blue sky, and visible film grain typical of a digitized color negative.
